roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
ACCT SETUP IN CUBS,REFER ALL FINES AND FEES TO COLLECTIONS UNIT

/CAL: DA 1203,2PC MOTION/CON: LISA DEWBERRY/WIAMTR/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:90 DAYS/ADDL CTS:6/SWAPD:03-11-10/X: BALANCE TO BE SERVED THRU TREATMENT ON DEMAND/OR/PROB EXT:11-18-12/
/X:GEORGE BECKWITH IS RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD/CON:BETSY WOLKIN/ /CAL:STATUS OF FILING OF MOTION TO WITHDRAW PLEA/NP/X:THE DEFENDANT IS IN CUSTODY IN ANOTHER MATTER/CONT/

/CAL:SENTENCE/X:THE DEFENDANT POSTED A BOND AFTER HE ENTERED HIS PLEA ANDIS OUT OF CUSTODY, HE IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO APD FOR A PSR INTERVIEW, HE WOULD ALSO LIKETO WITHDRAW HIS PLEA, THE COURT APPOINTS BETSY WOLKIN FOR THEPURPOSE OF INVESTIGATING THE MOTION TO WITHDRAW ONLY, MR, BECKWITH IS NOTRELIEVED AT THIS TIME/CONTD:STATUS OF MOTION TO WITHDRAW PLEA/DOP/PRES:11-04-09/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: GEORGE BECKWITH/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:09-08-09/987,2/BAIL:20000/
/X:ATTORNEY BETSY WOLKIN APPEARING/TWS/CONTD:TO SET SENTENCING OR TO SETA HEARING ON THE MOTION TO WITHDRAW PLEA/
/CAL:STATUS OF MOTION TO WITHDRAW PLEA/X:ATTORNEY BETSY WOLKIN IS STILL INVESTIGATING/CONT/DOP/
/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS  1//FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:09-29-09/ARBUCKLE/
/CAL:SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:RELEASE TO SPR IS DENIED/X:THE 09-04-09 PRELIMINARY HEARING IS CONFIRMED/LD:09-08-09/
